faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in East Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in East Orange typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and treatment method selected. We offer free inspections and transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in East Orange homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments take 4-6 hours to complete. Heat treatments can often eliminate bed bugs in a single day, while chemical treatments may require 2-3 follow-up visits spaced two weeks apart to ensure complete eradication of all life stages.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets in East Orange?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are EPA-approved and safe when applied by our certified technicians. We provide detailed preparation and re-entry instructions. Heat treatments are chemical-free, while our targeted chemical applications use products safe for residential use.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day bed bug service in East Orange?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency bed bug services throughout East Orange, NJ. We understand the urgency of bed bug infestations and prioritize rapid response to prevent the problem from spreading. Call us before noon for potential same-day treatment.
